name: Nut Frappe
recipeInstructions:
This was the RODIER wedding dessert on August 1, 1927.
Soak gelatin in cold water for 5 minutes. Dissolve over hot water. Add dissolved gelatin to whipped cream, milk, and sugar mixture. Stir in beaten egg white. When completely chilled, add chopped pineapple and strawberries, as well as chopped nuts. Serve cold in sherbet glasses.
